\usepackage[dvipsnames]{xcolor}
\newcommand{\red}[1]{{\color{red}#1}}
\newcommand{\todo}[1]{{\color{red}#1}}
\newcommand{\TODO}[1]{\textbf{\color{red}[TODO: #1]}}
\newcommand{\figref}[1]{Fig.~\ref{#1}}%
\newcommand{\tabref}[1]{Tab.~\ref{#1}}%
\newcommand{\secref}[1]{Sec.~\ref{#1}}
\renewcommand{\eqref}[1]{Eqn.~(\ref{#1})}
\newcommand{\methodname}{PhotoMaker\xspace}
\renewcommand{\paragraph}[1]{\vspace{2pt}\noindent\textbf{#1}}
\newcommand{\sota}[1]{\textbf{#1}}
\newcommand{\subsota}[1]{\underline{#1}}
\newcommand{\tablestyle}[2]{\setlength{\tabcolsep}{#1}\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{#2}\centering\footnotesize}
\definecolor{baselinecolor}{gray}{.9}
\newcommand{\baseline}[1]{\cellcolor{baselinecolor}{#1}}
\usepackage{circledsteps}
\usepackage{multirow}
